---
title: "test_verify_valkyrie_real_empire.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\empire_tests\test_verify_valkyrie_real_empire.py"
loc: 1
complexity: 1
logic_score: 9.60
style_score: 9.50
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 5.20
---

## Intent
The `test_verify_valkyrie_real_empire.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on test_hello. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via test_hello. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 9.6/10
- **Style [S]**: 9.5/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 4 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
Minimal internal dependencies.

### Exports
- `test_hello`
